channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] 12 years ago Band-Maid played at HEAVEN'S ROCK SAITAMA-SHINTOSHIN VJ-3 in Sai...

item.title: [BlueSky] 3 years ago Band-Maid played 19 songs at Bayou Music Center in Houston US on ...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Setlist Bot (bandmaidsetlistbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
3 years ago Band-Maid played 19 songs at Bayou Music Center in Houston US on 2023/5/14. The opening song was DOMINATION.

BlueSky · bandmaidsetlistbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] #MusicChallenge
item.dc:creator: SUgoiBxMxC1968 - Bass Player (babymetalfanatic.bsky.social)
item.description:
#MusicChallenge
Name 10 bands you've obsessed over at some point:
(11 for the price of 10)

1. Rush
2. Dream Theater
3. Fates Warning
4. Babymetal
5. Slayer
6. Depeche Mode
7. The Cure
8. Epica
9. Band-Maid
10. Jinjer
11. Yes

There are too many to list. This is what came off the top of my head.

BlueSky · babymetalfanatic.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Band Maid is so impressive on every level it blows me away every time I liste...
item.dc:creator: Nuclear Boarhead🐗🏳️‍⚧️ (yuriswine.bsky.social)
item.description:
Band Maid is so impressive on every level it blows me away every time I listen to them or watch their live videos and I want to see them live so badly some day. Incredible artists 💜💜💜💜💜💜💜
youtu.be/iaf94nNSRGE?...

BlueSky · yuriswine.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] granted, horizon XS has... band-maid, babymetal and one ok rock. which isn't ...
item.dc:creator: mae✨ (maesekiha.bsky.social)
item.description:
granted, horizon XS has... band-maid, babymetal and one ok rock. which isn't Bad but is pretty basic. i guess i appreciate ADTR, rise against and spiritbox being there even if they're not japanese

BlueSky · maesekiha.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] ENERGETIC[初回生産限定盤(CD+BD)] - BAND-MAID(メガジャケ(オリジナル絵柄)付) (Amazon限定) が、ミュージックランキ...

item.title: [BlueSky] looking at the FH6 soundtrack
item.dc:creator: funny racc (remyraccoon.bsky.social)
item.description:
looking at the FH6 soundtrack

Coheed? ONE OK ROCK? Rise Against? BABYMETAL? BAND-MAID? Utada Hikaru???? It actually looks really solid dude I’m so mad

item.title: [BlueSky] — I can’t live without you. must be an exciting song at servings. Will you be...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— I can’t live without you. must be an exciting song at servings. Will you be able to sing it?

Saiki: I’ll be able to sing it easily before the next serving, probably?

Miku Kobato: We Band-Maid are basically like that. First, we train ourselves at recording and record our best, then we practice by

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I could not agree more with that. Misa from Band-Maid, the barefoot assassin,...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
I could not agree more with that. Misa from Band-Maid, the barefoot assassin, is as cool as it can get. And what incredible bass tone.

item.title: [BlueSky] Nouvel album annoncé pour le groupe #BANDMAID. "ENERGETIC" sortira le 24/06 e...
item.dc:creator: Xavier F. (fxmaccobra.bsky.social)
item.description:
Nouvel album annoncé pour le groupe #BANDMAID. "ENERGETIC" sortira le 24/06 et est disponible en pré-commande
RE: www.cdjapan.co.jp/product/PCCA...
LE(DVD): www.cdjapan.co.jp/product/PCCA...
LE(BD): www.cdjapan.co.jp/product/PCCA...

Le groupe sera en concert au Bataclan (Paris) le 09/06.

BlueSky · fxmaccobra.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] BARKS編集部【インタビュー】BAND-MAID、「未来がもっともっと明るくなるように」
item.dc:creator: 佐藤英男 (sato-hideo.bsky.social)
item.description:
BARKS編集部【インタビュー】BAND-MAID、「未来がもっともっと明るくなるように」
barks.jp/news/1065309/
“そして何よりも重要なのは、2027年はお給仕（ライブ）活動を小休止することが公表されているとはいえ、すでに彼女たちの視線がその先にまで向かっているということだ。”
#BANDMAID #BARKS

BlueSky · sato-hideo.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Hard rock band BAND-MAID will release their first new single of 2026, "ENERGE...
item.dc:creator: JaME (English Version) (jameworld.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hard rock band BAND-MAID will release their first new single of 2026, "ENERGETIC", on June 24th.

www.jame-world.com/en/news/1712...

#BANDMAID #jrock

BlueSky · jameworld.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Usually they're all so young it's just awww, but thankfully Band Maid are all...
item.dc:creator: Oftentimes Jack 🇮🇪🤝🇵🇸 (pepsffk.bsky.social)
item.description:
Usually they're all so young it's just awww, but thankfully Band Maid are all closer to me.

Sai-chan is beautiful, those teeth are adorable.

BlueSky · pepsffk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 📎 ワールドツアーを日本武道館2daysで飾るBAND-MAIDが、”メイドの日”にニューシングル「ENERGETIC」のリリースをサプライズ発表！収録...
item.dc:creator: 日刊エンタメクリップ (entameclip.bsky.social)
item.description:
📎 ワールドツアーを日本武道館2daysで飾るBAND-MAIDが、”メイドの日”にニューシングル「ENERGETIC」のリリースをサプライズ発表！収録内容&ジャケット画像を公開！アーティスト写真も一新！

【記事を読む】
entameclip.com/news/478220/

#BANDMAID

BlueSky · entameclip.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] New Band-Maid single, Energetic, coming on June 24th

item.title: [BlueSky] ing" means "we are here now." I wrote it with the hope that even if our bodie...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
ing" means "we are here now." I wrote it with the hope that even if our bodies were to disappear, someone might someday pass on this music. I hope our music will remain in the future. I thought it would be wonderful if people in the future who have no idea who BAND-MAID are could learn of their exis

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 本日の冥土の日のライブ、ギックリ腰が良くならないのでお留守番でござる…orz
item.dc:creator: くぼんヌ。@ジミコスキー (kubonnu.bsky.social)
item.description:
本日の冥土の日のライブ、ギックリ腰が良くならないのでお留守番でござる…orz
久々の(比較的)良番だったのに残念！
お給仕行かれる皆様楽しんできてください！！！
#bandmaid #メイドの日

BlueSky · kubonnu.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] So... this was not the first time #Kreator have played at Welcome to Rockville.
item.dc:creator: Kreator Fangirls (kreatorfangirls.metalhead.club.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
So... this was not the first time #Kreator have played at Welcome to Rockville.

In 2023, they played a 30 minute show round 4-something PM.

And for a curious fan from half way around the world, it was not the most pleasant experience checking what others to […]

[Original post on metalhead.club]

BlueSky · kreatorfangirls.metalhead.club.ap.brid.gy

item.title: [BlueSky] This CD has been in the car CD player for about 3 weeks, I can almost sing al...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
This CD has been in the car CD player for about 3 weeks, I can almost sing along to the Japanese lyrics and I don't speak Japanese. Most drives I listen to 2/3 of the album and am happy to pickup where it stopped. It's like a 50 minute well curated playlist, no boredom to be found. 👍👍😊

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I'd like to make a small suggestion, of either the two on the right-side of t...

item.description:

item.title: [BlueSky] this heaviness is becoming another uniqueness of Band-Maid.
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
this heaviness is becoming another uniqueness of Band-Maid.

Kanami: The perfect limited edition is a double album with the two concepts “Return to the roots” and “Progress from the present”, and Manners is a song to bridge them. That’s why it’s included in both discs. There are many masters and pr

item.title: [BlueSky] 19) Can't think of a singular favorite song.
item.dc:creator: Bishop Steiner (bishopsteiner.bsky.social)
item.description:
19) Can't think of a singular favorite song.

While My Guitar Gently Weeps - the Beatles
Infinite Dreams - Iron Maiden
From Now On - Band Maid
Master's Apprentices - Opeth
the Highwayman - Loreena McKennitt
War Pigs - Black Sabbath
Am I evil? Metallica and Diamond Head
Ring of Fire, Johnny Cash

BlueSky · bishopsteiner.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 18) Band-Maid, the Warning, Lovebites, Nightwish, Loreena McKennitt, Metallic...
item.dc:creator: Bishop Steiner (bishopsteiner.bsky.social)
item.description:
18) Band-Maid, the Warning, Lovebites, Nightwish, Loreena McKennitt, Metallica, Iron Maiden, Epica, Opeth, Bach, Beethoven, Mozart, Johnny Cash, Marty Robinson, Beyond the Black, Charlie Crockett, Bolt Thrower, Death, Death Angel, etc....

BlueSky · bishopsteiner.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] JOURNEY、NIGHT RANGER、BAND-MAID出演の音楽イベント”THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA”、追加出演者にLOUD...
item.dc:creator: MAGMOE (magmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
JOURNEY、NIGHT RANGER、BAND-MAID出演の音楽イベント”THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA”、追加出演者にLOUDNESS、HOUND DOG決定！

https://www.magmoe.com/2958134/entertainment-news/2026-05-07/

8月29日に、みずほPayPayドーム福岡にて開催される大型音楽ライヴ・イベント”THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA”に、新たにHOUND DOG、LOUDNESSの出演が決定した [...]

BlueSky · magmoe.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] BABYMETAL AND YOASOBI are on Forza Horizon 6's Japan-set soundtrack alongside...

item.description:
BABYMETAL AND YOASOBI are on Forza Horizon 6's Japan-set soundtrack alongside ONE OK ROCK, BAND-MAID, PassCode, and more.

A racing game just became the most exciting thing in gaming 🇯🇵

BlueSky · playswave.com

item.title: [BlueSky] Habt Ihr Ideen dazu, wie ich als greiser Drummer dazu beitragen kann, dass mi...
item.dc:creator: Marc on Drums ← ZURÜCK in die ZUKUNFT ← den Backlash beenden! (marcondrums.eurosky.social)
item.description:
Habt Ihr Ideen dazu, wie ich als greiser Drummer dazu beitragen kann, dass mich FLINTAs am Schlagzeug ablösen wollen?

4/4

(Foto im Ausgangspost: Akane Hirose von Band-Maid 🤘)

BlueSky · marcondrums.eurosky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Mehr Frauen in der Rockmusik – wo ansetzen?
item.dc:creator: Marc on Drums ← ZURÜCK in die ZUKUNFT ← den Backlash beenden! (marcondrums.eurosky.social)
item.description:
Mehr Frauen in der Rockmusik – wo ansetzen?

Ich gehe davon aus, dass Einstellungen, Verhalten und auch Interessen von Menschen hauptsächlich durch ihre Sozialisation geprägt sind und Ausprägungen wie bspw. „Frauen- und Männerberufe“ eher kulturell als biologisch begründet sind.

1/4

#FLINTA #Rock

BlueSky · marcondrums.eurosky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] een having more songs like that since Secret My lips, right?
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
een having more songs like that since Secret My lips, right?

Kanami: Is that so? I don’t remember.

Kobato: We’ve been having more and more developments like that since then, po.

Kanami: I’m glad when I’m said “You Band-Maid have a lot of songs like that” because I like them quite a lot.

— I’m dr

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] ut Band-Maid songs have such a cool development of the D-melody [note: differ...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
ut Band-Maid songs have such a cool development of the D-melody [note: different verse] after the chorus.

Kobato: You love changing developments, right? [Note: said to Kanami.]

Kanami: Of course we have songs like A-melody, B-melody, chorus, interlude, guitar solo, final chorus, and that’s all, bu

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Forza 6 has Band-Maid on the soundtrack.
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
Forza 6 has Band-Maid on the soundtrack.

I was going to pass on this version cos I'm a bit tired of Forza but with this news... I'm back in all over again :)

store.steampowered.com/app/2483190/...

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I know nothing about guitar on a technical level, but in terms of encapsulati...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
I know nothing about guitar on a technical level, but in terms of encapsulating the emotion of a song in a (short) solo, Kanami Tono on Band Maid's Daydreaming is pretty much perfect, IMO (www.youtube.com/watch?v=g6S0...)

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social
